title: Square of Hopeful Redemption

The '''Square of Hopeful Redemption''' was an square built at the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Redhaven]] before the [[Osarian-Rhommamool conflict]] between the [[Osarian]] and [[Rhommamoolian]]s, before the conflict, it was a primary trading [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] of the [[planet]] of [[Rhommamool/Legends|Rhommamool]]. After [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Nom Anor]]'s takeover, the spaceport was turned into a public square in which citizens could stone [[Droid/Legends|droids]], declare freedom from Osarian, renounce the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], and to cry out for a simpler time with no [[Technology (Disney Gallery: The Mandalorian)|technology]]. After Anor's takeover, it was also renamed to the Square of Hopeful Redemption. The citizens came to the square to stone droids and technological objects.<ref name="NJO" />

In [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]],<ref name="Essential Reader's Companion">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref> Nom Anor and his [[Red Knights of Life]] stoned a [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]] they found, [[C-9PO (Rhommamool)|C-9PO]] which wandered across the city of Redhaven.<ref name="NJO" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Square of Hopeful Redemption appeared in the [[1999]] novel ''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]'', written by [[R. A. Salvatore]], the first volume in the ''[[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order]]'' novel series.<ref name="NJO" />
